name: T-Con
notes: Could not locate any public site or info — needs user input. Searched Google for 'T-Con Norway convention', 'T-Con Trondheim/Tønsberg/Tromsø anime cosplay convention', and checked rostercon.com Norway listings, fancons.com (403), the Magicon community page (403), cosplay.no Norway list (503), and Banzaicon/KawaiiCon site mentions — no Norwegian convention named 'T-Con' surfaced. The closest hit is Torucon (Trondheim), which is already its own entry and unlikely to be what is meant. The user noted this is low priority / different format, so deferring to manual decision.
